list.name: Failure Discovered
list.query: SELECT name_of,type_of FROM (SELECT name_of,type_of,active FROM "failures" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "sys_name", "failure_type", "object_type" LIMIT 25) WHERE ("active" = 'True')

list.name: Failure Resolved
list.query: SELECT name_of,type_of FROM (SELECT name_of,type_of,active FROM "failures" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "sys_name", "failure_type", "object_type" LIMIT 25) WHERE ("active" = 'False')

panels.description: List of disks on the selected system(s)
panels.title: Disks

targets.query: SELECT mean("combinedResponseTime") FROM "disks" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "sys_name" fill(none)
SELECT mean("ds_combinedResponseTime") FROM "downsample_retention"."disks" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time($__interval), "sys_name" fill(none)
SELECT sum("ds_combinedThroughput") FROM "downsample_retention"."disks" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time(5s), "sys_name" fill(none)
SELECT sum("ds_combinedIOps") FROM "downsample_retention"."disks" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time(5s), "sys_name" fill(none)

panels.description: List of volumes on the selected system(s)
panels.title: Volumes

panels.description: SANtricity API sometimes returns nonsensical values (outliers)

targets.query: SELECT mean("ds_combinedResponseTime") FROM "downsample_retention"."volumes" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time($__interval), "sys_name" fill(none)

panels.title: Average Volume Latency

panels.description: SANtricity API sometimes returns nonsensical values (outliers)

targets.query: SELECT sum("ds_combinedThroughput") FROM "downsample_retention"."volumes" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time(5s), "sys_name" fill(none)

panels.title: Total Volume Throughput

panels.description: SANtricity API sometimes returns nonsensical values (outliers)

targets.query: SELECT sum("combinedIOps") FROM "default_retention"."volumes" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5s), "sys_name" fill(none)
SELECT sum("ds_combinedIOps") FROM "downsample_retention"."volumes" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time(5s), "sys_name" fill(none)

panels.title: Total Volume IOps

targets.query: SELECT "cpuAvgUtilization" FROM "systems" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "sys_name" fill(none)
SELECT last("ds_cpuAvgUtilization") FROM "downsample_retention"."systems" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time($__interval), "sys_name" fill(none)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT last("name_of"),active FROM "failures" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "sys_name", "failure_type", "object_type") WHERE ("active" = 'True')

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "systems" WITH KEY = "sys_name"
list.label: System
list.name: System
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "systems" WITH KEY = "sys_name"
